calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-08-2022 Off Calendar

Motion To Approve Prop 65 Settlement
Off Calendar Nov-07-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF KEEP AMERICA SAFE AND BEAUTIFUL's Motion To Approve Prop 65 Settlement.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and consent decree" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
